title: odontarrhena libanotica
intro: Odontarrhena libanotica, also known as Syrian rue or Dahekke, is a flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. Traditionally used in medicine, it has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its alkaloid compounds, including harmine and tetrahydroharmine. The health benefits of Odontarrhena libanotica include its potential use as a treatment for various ailments, such as fever reduction, digestive issues, and anxiety relief, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In herbal preparations, Odontarrhena libanotica is often used as a dried herb or in the form of a tincture, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to potential side effects and interactions.
